description_long: This shotgun features a robust, tactical design with a predominantly dark green and black color scheme accented by metallic silver components. The body is constructed with a combination of metal and polymer, giving it a modern, industrial appearance suitable for urban environments. The receiver and barrel assembly are detailed with vented and ribbed elements, suggesting enhanced cooling and structural reinforcement. The stock is a thumbhole type, providing ergonomic support and improved handling, while the pistol grip is integrated into the stock for stability. The action mechanism appears semi-automatic, with no visible pump or lever, and the trigger guard is large and rounded, allowing for gloved use. Additional features include a rail system on top for mounting optics and a prominent cylindrical barrel with a vented shroud.
description: A tactical, semi-automatic shotgun with a green and black finish, thumbhole stock, and vented barrel shroud, designed for urban use. Features include a large rounded trigger guard and a top rail for attachments.
description_view_0: Front view showing the cylindrical barrel opening, vented shroud, and top rail alignment.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the thumbhole stock, integrated pistol grip, vented barrel, and top rail.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the stock's thumbhole design, grip, and the alignment of the receiver and barrel.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile mirroring view 1, with clear visibility of the action mechanism and stock details.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with vented shroud and ribbing
attribute_trigger_guard_design: large, rounded trigger guard with integrated finger groove and reinforced edges
